# CircleCI CLI

Set an advanced project setting to true or false.

JSON fields: name, value

Available settings:
| Name                          | Description                                           |
| ----------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| build-forked-pull-requests    | Build pull requests from forked repositories          |
| forks-receive-secret-env-vars | Pass secret environment variables to forked-PR builds |
| oss                           | Mark project as free and open source                  |
| auto-cancel-builds            | Automatically cancel redundant workflows              |
| set-github-status             | Report build status back to GitHub                    |
| build-prs-only                | Only build branches that have open pull requests      |
| disable-ssh                   | Disable SSH access to build containers                |
| write-settings-requires-admin | Require admin role to change project settings         |
| ai-error-summarization        | Enable AI-powered error summarization                 |
| dynamic-config                | Enable dynamic configuration (setup workflows)        |
| unversioned-config            | Allow triggering pipelines without a config file      |
| disable-running               | Disable all builds for this project                   |

For more information about output formatting flags, see `circleci help formatting`.

## Usage

`circleci project settings set <setting> <true|false> [flags]`

## Flags

| Flag               | Description                                             |
| ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| `--jq string`      | Process values from the response using jq syntax        |
| `--json`           | Output as JSON                                          |
| `--project string` | Project slug (e.g. gh/org/repo); defaults to git remote |

## Inherited Flags

| Flag                  | Description                                                  |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `-c, --config string` | Path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml) |
| `--debug`             | Enable debug logging                                         |
| `--no-color`          | Disable ANSI color output (same as setting NO_COLOR)         |
| `-q, --quiet`         | Suppress informational output. Data on stdout is unaffected  |

## Examples

- Enable a setting for the current project: 
  `circleci project settings set build-forked-pull-requests true`
- Disable a setting for a specific project: 
  `circleci project settings set build-forked-pull-requests false --project gh/myorg/myrepo`
- Output the updated value as JSON: 
  `circleci project settings set auto-cancel-builds true --json`

## Learn More

- Use `circleci <command> <subcommand> --help` for more information about a command.
- Read the manual at <https://cli.circleci.com/reference/>
- Support at <https://github.com/CircleCI-Public/circleci-cli/issues>
